notes: Security hardening across the board, following a full security review.
Large files now work fully offline, even the first time you use the app.
New: a blog with plain-language guides on sending files safely.
A cleaner interface, with icons and hover cues on every action, a friendlier first run, and a refined logo.
FileKey now follows your device's light or dark theme by default.
Works on Safari and iPhone, alongside every other modern browser.
Large files encrypt and decrypt smoothly, without freezing the page.
Clearer sharing, contacts, and recovery, with refreshed copy throughout.
